sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { formatDate } from '../data/bookingData.js'; import styles from '../styles/ConfirmationPage.module.css'; const ConfirmationPage = ({ data, onNewBooking }) => { if (!data) return null; const { checkIn, checkOut, nights, room, guests, guestName, guestContact, contactMethod, specialRequests, total, refCode } = data; const isEmail = contactMethod === 'email'; const contactLabel = isEmail ? 'Email' : 'Messenger'; const contactDisplay = isEmail ? guestContact : ( {guestContact} ); return (
✦
Reservation Confirmed
ありがとう

Thank you, {guestName.split(' ')[0]}!

Your stay at Mizuya Exclusive Resort has been reserved.

Reference Code {refCode}
Check-in {formatDate(checkIn)} 2:00 PM · Please bring a valid ID
Check-out {formatDate(checkOut)} 12:00 NN · Late check-out upon request
Duration {nights} night{nights !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
Guests {guests} guest{guests !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
Room {room.icon} {room.name} {room.description}
{contactLabel} {contactDisplay}
Total Amount ₱{total.toLocaleString()} VAT inclusive · Pay upon arrival
{specialRequests && (
Special Requests {specialRequests}
)}
🌸 {isEmail ? (

A confirmation email will be sent to {guestContact}. For inquiries, contact us at reservations@mizuya.ph

) : (

Our team will reach out to you via Messenger at {guestContact}. For inquiries, contact us at reservations@mizuya.ph

)}
); }; export default ConfirmationPage;
